fault_hypothesis: On line 65, the average is computed by dividing total by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series has fewer samples than the window, this produces a deflated average instead of the true mean of available samples.

constraints.intent: After computing avg, it must equal total divided by the actual number of samples, not the window size.

spec.expr: len(tail__1) == window or abs(avg__1 - total__1 / len(tail__1)) < 1e-9

constraints.intent: avg__1 should equal total divided by actual sample count whenever series is shorter than window.
Verify that before avg__1 is used, the correct divisor would be len(tail__1) not window when tail is shorter.
The returned average must equal total divided by actual number of available samples.
